case_title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY, INCORPORATED VS. GWENDOLYN D. BRIGHTMON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - MANAGEMENT AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY, INCORPORATED

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY FULLY SATISFIED AS TO PLAINTIFF'S POSSESSION ONLY WITH ACCRUED COST OF $85.00. AS TO DEFENDANT BRIGHTMON, GWENDOLYN D.
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY, INCORPORATED ON DEFENDANT BRIGHTMON, GWENDOLYN D.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT BRIGHTMON, GWENDOLYN D.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY, INCORPORATED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRIGHTMON, GWENDOLYN D. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 820 O'FARRELL ST. #314, S.F. CA., SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY, INCORPORATED AS TO DEFENDANT BRIGHTMON, GWENDOLYN D. DOES 1-5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
